allow: Bash(export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" && cargo build --workspace 2>&1 | grep -E "^\(error|   Compiling|    Finished\)" 2>/dev/null || export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" && cargo build --workspace 2>&1)

Bash(git -C "C:/Users/spare/source/repos/MachinDeOuf" add -A && git -C "C:/Users/spare/source/repos/MachinDeOuf" commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: Initial commit — 21-crate Rust ML workspace for Claude Code skills

MachinDeOuf: composable ML/math algorithms as Claude Code skills marketplace.

Crates:
- machin-math: linalg, stats, distance, activation, calculus, random
- machin-optimize: SGD, Adam, simulated annealing, PSO
- machin-supervised: regression, classification, metrics
- machin-unsupervised: K-Means clustering, dimensionality reduction
- machin-ensemble: random forest, boosting
- machin-nn: neural network layers, loss functions, backprop
- machin-rl: bandits \(epsilon-greedy, UCB1, Thompson\), Q-learning
- machin-evolution: genetic algorithms, differential evolution
- machin-graph: graph algorithms, Markov chains, HMM/Viterbi, state spaces
- machin-probabilistic: Bloom filter, Count-Min sketch, HyperLogLog
- machin-io: CSV, JSON, file watcher, TCP, HTTP, WebSocket
- machin-signal: FFT, wavelets, filters, Kalman, spectral analysis
- machin-chaos: Lyapunov exponents, bifurcation, attractors, fractals
- machin-game: Nash equilibria, Shapley value, auctions, mean field
- machin-search: A*, Q*, MCTS, minimax, alpha-beta, BFS/DFS
- machin-gpu: WGPU compute shaders for cosine similarity, matmul
- machin-cache: embedded Redis-like store with TTL, LRU, pub/sub, RESP
- machin-pipeline: DAG executor with parallel branches and memoization
- machin-adversarial: FGSM, PGD, C&W, defense, poisoning detection, privacy
- machin-skill: CLI exposing all algorithms as Claude Code skills

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" 2>&1)
Bash(git -C "C:/Users/spare/source/repos/MachinDeOuf" branch -M main && git -C "C:/Users/spare/source/repos/MachinDeOuf" push -u origin main 2>&1)
Bash(export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" && cargo build -p machin-supervised -p machin-unsupervised -p machin-ensemble 2>&1)
